Beginner's Guide 📘

Android 📱

Software 💾

Useful 🔧

Games 🎮

Developer 👨‍💻

Unsafe ⚠️

On this page

Android ​

Modded apps, privacy tools, and utilities for a better Android experience.

Browsers ​

  • Brave Nightly - inbuilt adblocker, better set adblocker to aggressive

  • Firefox Nightly - must have ublock extension

  • Cromite - inbuilt adblocker, chrome like look & feel

Modded APKs ​

  • Mobilism - login required

  • 4pda

  • RockMods

  • Androeed

Social Media Mods ​

  • YouTube - must install microg or alternative first

  • YouTube Music - must install microg or alternative first

  • Aliucord - Discord

  • Piko - twitter / 𝕏

  • NaGram - simplest adfree Tg client

  • Ayugram - ghost mode featured Tg client

  • Spotify - adfree spotify

  • Reddit - adfree mod

Privacy & Security ​

  • ByeDPI - unblock websites without relying on vpn

  • ProtonPass - best passwd manager, bitwarden also good

File Management ​

  • MixPlorer, 2 - advanced file manager

  • LocalSend - file sharing to nearby devices

Media & Downloaders ​

  • MPVkt, VLC - media player

  • Auxio, Foobar2000 - offline music player

  • Shazam - identify what song you're listening to

  • YtDlnis, Seal - audio/video downloader

  • OuterTune - youtube music client

Utilities ​

  • Droidify - playstore for foss apps

  • Android Debloater - remove unnecessary apps from android
